creator: miguelmclara@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #3)
I've missed you're reply, but in the meantime I notice the same "problem" with xdg-email, which causes other apps like Chromium to fail to use my default mailto app in Lumina!

The fix is similar, but I guess its best to submit both patched files to upstream, I'll try that and update this PR with any developments.
